Product Strategy 2024: The 2024 product strategy is built around expanding upmarket into mid-market and enterprise segments, while deepening the AI capabilities that differentiate the platform from commodity competitors. Pricing will shift from a per-seat model to a usage-based model in H1, aligning revenue with the value customers derive from AI features. The platform will receive a full redesign of the user experience in Q2, guided by six months of user research and co-design sessions with 12 key accounts. International expansion into the DACH and Benelux markets is targeted for Q3, requiring localization, GDPR-compliant data residency options, and regional sales hires.
